# Flow Microreactor

**Summary**: A system where chemical reactions occur in small-diameter tubes to improve heat and mass transfer.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-hassan|Hassan, 2015]] used a flow microreactor to enhance reaction conditions and safety during the synthesis of organic compounds.

## Key Results and Findings

- Flow reactors provide significant processing advantages including improved thermal management, mixing control, and ability to handle extreme conditions. ([[2015-hassan|Hassan, 2015, p. 38]])
